prompt_text: Korean webtoon manhwa style, close-up portrait of a young male martial artist with sharp features and weary eyes, wuxia genre. Expression of quiet anguish, tears forming but not falling. Cel-shaded with gradient accents, dramatic side lighting casting deep shadows in dark indigo (#1a1a2e). Muted color palette of steel blue and slate gray (#4a4a6a, #8b8ba3). Traditional hanbok collar visible. Subtle fog drifting in background. High detail, publication ready, dark mature tone.

Korean webtoon manhwa style, intense close-up of a male warrior mid-strike, teeth gritted, eyes blazing with killing intent. Wuxia genre. Hair and robes whipping from motion. Speed lines radiating outward. Cel-shaded with sharp highlights on cheekbones and jawline. Dark indigo shadows (#1a1a2e), crimson accent (#8b0000) reflected in eyes. Thicker linework on foreground face, intentional roughness conveying explosive energy. Dramatic lighting from below, high contrast. Publication ready.

Korean webtoon manhwa style, dynamic full-body action shot. A dark-robed swordsman lunging forward with a devastating diagonal slash, blade trailing golden qi energy (#c9a227). Wuxia martial arts genre. Dust and debris exploding from footwork. Cel-shaded with gradient accents on the energy trail. Dark palette (#2d2d44, #6b6b8a) for the figure, dramatic high-contrast lighting. Motion blur on blade edge, clean thick foreground lines. Mysterious fog parting from the force of the strike. Dark mature tone, high detail.

Korean webtoon manhwa style, moment of devastating impact. A palm strike connecting with a stone pillar, massive cracks radiating outward in a spider-web pattern. Wuxia genre. Shockwave ripples visible in the air, debris frozen mid-explosion. Dark crimson (#8b0000) qi energy bursting from the point of contact. Cel-shaded, extreme high contrast lighting — bright flash at impact center fading to deep indigo (#1a1a2e) at edges. Rough dynamic linework conveying raw power. Ground shattering beneath the fighter's feet. Publication ready, high detail.

Korean webtoon manhwa style, medium shot of two figures facing each other in tense conversation. On the left, a young man in dark navy robes (#2d2d44) with a guarded expression. On the right, an older figure draped entirely in black (#0d0d0d, #1a1a1a), face half-hidden in shadow, faint menacing smile. Wuxia genre. Cel-shaded with gradient accents, dramatic side lighting from a single lantern casting long shadows. Mist curling at their feet. Dark mature tone, mysterious atmosphere. Clean linework, high detail, publication ready.

Korean webtoon manhwa style, wide medium shot of four martial artists seated around a low wooden table in a dimly lit room. Wuxia genre. Each figure in distinct robes — dark navy, pure black, pale white (#f5f5f5), and muted gray. Tense atmosphere, no one touching their tea. Cel-shaded with gradient accents, warm golden (#c9a227) candlelight illuminating faces from the center, deep indigo (#1a1a2e) shadows filling the corners. Clean varied linework, thicker lines on foreground figures. Dark mature tone, mysterious, high detail.

Korean webtoon manhwa style, wide establishing shot of a narrow mountain path winding through dense fog. Wuxia genre. Ancient twisted pine trees emerging from the mist like grasping hands. Faint golden glow (#c9a227) from an unseen source deep in the fog suggesting something mystical. Color palette dominated by dark indigo (#1a1a2e) and muted steel blue (#4a4a6a, #8b8ba3). Cel-shaded with soft gradient fog layers. No characters visible, only a single set of footprints in the dirt. Mysterious, tense atmosphere. Dramatic lighting, high detail, publication ready.

Korean webtoon manhwa style, interior of a rundown wuxia-era tavern. Wooden beams and pillars, paper lanterns casting warm amber light. Scattered tables with ceramic bowls and wine jars. Haze of incense smoke drifting through the air. A worn counter at the back with shelves of clay pots. Cel-shaded with gradient accents, warm golden highlights (#c9a227) contrasting with deep indigo shadows (#1a1a2e) in the corners. Slate gray and muted blue mid-tones (#4a4a6a, #8b8ba3). Clean linework with high detail on wood grain textures. Dark mature tone, atmospheric, publication ready.

Korean webtoon manhwa style, emotionally charged farewell scene. A young martial artist in dark navy robes (#2d2d44) standing with his back to the viewer, looking over his shoulder one last time. A figure in pure white robes (#f5f5f5, #e0e0e0) stands distant and blurred in the background, one hand slightly raised. Wuxia genre. Autumn leaves drifting between them. Cel-shaded with soft gradient accents, melancholic golden hour lighting filtering through trees. Long dramatic shadows. Mist rising from the ground. Color palette shifting from warm gold (#c9a227) near the distant figure to cold indigo (#1a1a2e) around the foreground figure. High detail, publication ready, dark mature tone.

Korean webtoon manhwa style, dramatic low-angle establishing shot of a towering dark pagoda rising into a stormy sky. Wuxia genre. The structure is ancient and imposing, seven tiers of curved eaves silhouetted against churning clouds. Faint crimson light (#8b0000) glowing from the topmost window. Lightning illuminating the scene in flashes of stark white. Fog swirling around the base, obscuring a stone stairway leading up. Color palette of deep indigo (#1a1a2e) and dark slate (#4a4a6a) with selective golden (#c9a227) accent on ornamental roof details. Cel-shaded with gradient accents on the clouds. Mysterious, tense atmosphere. High detail, publication ready.
